computed.name: Validate required files for adobe Agreement creation
Validate the button if the document validation are fullfilled
Validates the files to display the right control
CQP_SHOW_ERROR
Set the list of files to send in adobe
Set the default expiration date
Limit date for expiration
Set the minimun date for expiration
Validate that the expiration date is in the margin of dates available
computed.formula:
let CQP_CUSTOM_EXPIRATION_DATE = this.CQP_CUSTOM_EXPIRATION_DATE
let CQP_LIMIT_EXPIRATION_DATE = this.CQP_LIMIT_EXPIRATION_DATE
let CQP_MIN_EXPIRATION_DATE = this.CQP_MIN_EXPIRATION_DATE

return {
    isValid: moment(CQP_CUSTOM_EXPIRATION_DATE).isBetween(CQP_MIN_EXPIRATION_DATE, CQP_LIMIT_EXPIRATION_DATE, null, "[]"),
    message: "The expiracy expiration date has to be between " + moment(CQP_MIN_EXPIRATION_DATE).format('MM/DD/YYYY') + " and " + moment(CQP_LIMIT_EXPIRATION_DATE).format('MM/DD/YYYY')
}

computed.name: Validates the workflow selected by user based on the current reinsurers

script.title: CQP - Get Workflows Documents
script.code:
<?php 
/*********************************
* Get Workflow Documents
*
* by Diego Tapia
*********************************/
use GuzzleHttp\Client;
use GuzzleHttp\Psr7\Request;

//Set initial variables
$adobeClient = null;
$currentUserEmail = $api->users()->getUserById($data["CPQ_USER_ID"])['email'];
return $currentUserEmail;
$response = [
    "CPQ_ADOBE_SUCCESS" => true,
    "CPQ_ADOBE_MESSAGE" => ""
];

// get Adobe Client
if(!createAdobeclient()) return $response;

// Get List of documents
$workflowCharacteristics = callAdobeClient("GET", "workflows/" . $data["CPQ_ADOBE_WORKFLOW_SELECTED"]);

if ($workflowCharacteristics === false) return $response;

if (!empty($workflowCharacteristics->fileInfos)) {
    foreach ($workflowCharacteristics->fileInfos as $adobefile) {
        $fileID = null;
        $uploadFile = true;

        if (isset($adobefile->workflowLibraryDocumentSelectorList)) {
            $fileID = $adobefile->workflowLibraryDocumentSelectorList[0]->workflowLibDoc;
            $uploadFile = false;
        }

        $workflowDocuments[] = [
            "LABEL" => $adobefile->label,
            "REQUIRED" => $uploadFile == false ? $uploadFile : $adobefile->required,
            "DOC_ID" => $fileID,
            "UPLOAD_FILE" => $uploadFile
        ];
    }
    $response["CPQ_DOCUMENTS"] = $workflowDocuments;
} else {
    $response["CPQ_DOCUMENTS"] = [];
}

return $response;
 
/**
 * Creates the client to call the Adobe APIs
 * 
 * @return boolean $response
 *
 * by Diego Tapia
 */ 
function createAdobeclient() {
    global $adobeClient, $currentUserEmail;

    try {
        $adobeClientGet = new Client(
            [
                'base_uri' => getenv("ADOBE_URL"),
                'headers' => [
                    'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
                    'Accept' => 'application/json',
                    'Authorization' => "Bearer "  . getenv("INTEGRATION_KEY_FORTICLIENT")
                ],
            ]
        );
        $urls = $adobeClientGet->request('GET', '/api/rest/v6/baseUris');
        $response = json_decode($urls->getBody()->getContents());

        $adobeClient = new Client(
            [
                'base_uri' => $response->apiAccessPoint,
                'headers' => [
                    'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
                    'Accept' => 'application/json',
                    'Authorization' => "Bearer "  . getenv("INTEGRATION_KEY_FORTICLIENT")
                ],
            ]
        );
        return true;
    } catch(\Exception $e) {
        setResponse("Issue in Adobe Client creation, please contact your system administrator");
        return false;
    }

}


/**
 * Call Adobe API
 * 
 * @param string $method
 * @param string $url
 * @param array $data
 * @return array $response
 *
 * by Diego Tapia
 */ 
function callAdobeClient($method, $url, $data = null) {
    global $adobeClient;

    try {
        if ($method == "GET") {
            $response = $adobeClient->request($method, "/api/rest/v6/" . $url);
        } 
        if ($method == "POST" || $method == "PUT") {
            $response = $adobeClient->request($method, "/api/rest/v6/" . $url, [
                "json" => $data
            ]);
        } 
        $response = json_decode($response->getBody()->getContents());
        return $response;
    } catch(\Exception $e) {
        setResponse("Issue in API " . $url . ", please contact your system administrator");
        return false;
    }

}


/**
 * Set script response in case of error
 * 
 * @param string $message
 *
 * by Diego Tapia
 */ 
function setResponse($message) {
    global $response;
    $response["CPQ_ADOBE_SUCCESS"] = false;
    $response["CPQ_ADOBE_MESSAGE"] = $message;
}

script.title: CQP - Watcher - Generate N Installments Date
script.description: Watcher to Generate N Installments Date script
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 * CQP - Watcher - Generate N Installments Date
 * By Natalia Mendez
 */

//Get Data from Form
$nInstallments = $data["CQP_N_INSTALLMENTS"] ?? null;

// Generate default N Dates for 
$summaryDates = generateSummaryClaims($nInstallments);

//Return Array Created
return $summaryDates;
